title: How a godly man becomes someone worth loving
caption:
Most men are waiting for the right woman. God's waiting for the right man.

The man who hunts for a relationship brings his emptiness into it — she can feel that desperation the second he walks in the room. You don't become worth loving by looking harder. You become it by building something worth joining: the faith, the finances, the character, the quality of your friendships.

The man who's walking with God, doing the work, going first into the cost — that's the man she can't stop thinking about. Not because he's trying to attract her. Because he's not.

Chase God. Let her find you.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #christianity #discipline #relationships
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
